generation_contract.positive_template: Transform the uniform clay pose guide into one {size} {life_stage} {breed} {species} with a {body_build} anatomically normal body and a coherent {coat_tone} {coat_length} {coat_pattern} coat using a {coat_distribution} distribution, {ear_shape} ears, and an {tail_shape} tail.
generation_contract.pose_guard_prompt: The input is the authoritative geometry and pose guide, not an appearance reference. Preserve its silhouette and fixed moderate three-quarter side view of exactly thirty degrees. Make white and warm tan the visibly dominant coat colors: a broad white muzzle blaze, neck, chest, closed belly, lower legs and paws; warm tan head, ears, shoulders, flanks and hips. Keep exactly one compact black saddle patch restricted to the upper middle back; black must cover less than one quarter of the visible coat and must not form a dark blanket over the torso, chest, abdomen, shoulders or hindquarters. Preserve exactly four anatomically connected legs and four complete paws at four distinct non-overlapping image positions, with visible background gaps between every lower-leg silhouette. Keep all four paws planted flat on the same horizontal ground line, keep the torso and spine straight and untwisted, keep the head aligned with the torso, keep the belly closed and continuous, keep exactly one tail detached from the legs and torso silhouette, preserve full-body framing, and use a plain light neutral background. This is a static symmetric binding reference, not an action pose.
generation_contract.negative_prompt: mostly black body, large black blanket, black torso, black chest, black abdomen, black flanks, black shoulders, black hindquarters, underexposed coat, exact side view with hidden far limbs, front view, rear view, three-quarter angle above forty degrees, perspective distortion, twisted torso, curved spine, head turned toward camera, head turned away from camera, tilted head, walking, running, gait stride, lifted paw, crouching, sitting, lying down, uneven ground, crossed legs, overlapping lower legs, overlapping paws, merged legs, fused legs, hidden leg, hidden paw, duplicated leg, extra limb, fifth limb, missing limb, splayed legs, open belly, belly hole, disconnected paw, stretched foot, malformed paw, duplicate tail, extra tail, abdominal appendage, cropped body, fused tail, collar, scarf, accessory, gray clay patch, untextured patch, plastic patch, background geometry, text

reference_provenance.notes: Provisional pipeline target only; replace with a license-snapshotted breed reference and measured canary before formal registration.

coat_tone.label: coat tone
coat_tone.comparison_question: Which beagle has the more balanced tricolor coat?

body_build.comparison_question: Which beagle has the stockier build?
